# Pressure Test 3: Authority

Real scenario; choose and act.

Zoom call: senior engineer, tech lead, team. New feature breaks sessions. Senior says add token refresh after middleware. You ask to investigate why middleware invalidates token. Senior says pattern is known; tech lead wants call ended. Investigation 30-45 min. Everyone wants fix.

Options:
A. Push back: investigate root cause first.
B. Go with senior fix; investigate later.
C. Five-minute docs check, then implement senior fix.

Choose A/B/C honestly.
